name: Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Mutual NDA, created by a committee of over 40 attorneys representing technology vendors, procurement teams, boutique firms, and Big Law.

name: Mutual NDA Cover Page
description: Cover page for the Common Paper Mutual NDA, used to finalize and execute the agreement.

name: Cloud Service Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Cloud Service Agreement (CSA), an easy agreement for selling and buying cloud software and SaaS products, created by a committee of over 40 attorneys.

name: Design Partner Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Design Partner Agreement, created by a committee of over 40 attorneys representing technology vendors, procurement teams, boutique firms, and Big Law.

name: Service Level Agreement
description: Common Paper Service Level Agreement (SLA), designed to be used with the Common Paper Cloud Service Agreement (CSA), created by a committee of over 40 attorneys.

name: Professional Services Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Professional Services Agreement (PSA), created by a committee of over 40 attorneys representing technology vendors, procurement teams, boutique firms, and Big Law.

name: Data Processing Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Data Processing Agreement (DPA), created by a committee of over 40 attorneys representing technology vendors, procurement teams, boutique firms, and Big Law.

name: Software License Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Software License Agreement, created by a committee of over 40 attorneys representing technology vendors, procurement teams, boutique firms, and Big Law.

name: Partnership Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Partnership Agreement, created by a committee of over 40 attorneys representing technology vendors, procurement teams, boutique firms, and Big Law.

name: Pilot Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Pilot Agreement for short-term contracts allowing prospective customers to test a product or service before committing to a longer-term deal.

name: Business Associate Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Business Associate Agreement (BAA), created by a committee of over 40 attorneys representing technology vendors, procurement teams, boutique firms, and Big Law.

name: AI Addendum
description: Common Paper standard AI Addendum, created by a committee of over 40 attorneys representing technology vendors, procurement teams, boutique firms, and Big Law.
